description_long: This is a metallic combination wrench featuring a U-shaped open end on one side and a closed, circular box end on the other. The body is elongated and flat, with a slight taper toward the open jaw, and is finished in a dark, glossy coating. The open end is designed for gripping hexagonal nuts or bolts, while the box end provides a more secure grip for turning fasteners. Subtle embossed markings, likely indicating the brand and size, are visible along the shaft. The wrench appears robust and is likely made from forged steel, suitable for heavy-duty mechanical tasks. Its overall design is utilitarian, with no visible grip enhancements or ergonomic features.
description: A dark, glossy combination wrench with an open U-shaped jaw on one end and a circular box end on the other, featuring embossed markings on its flat shaft.
description_view_0: The wrench is seen from the front, clearly showing the open U-shaped jaw and the circular box end, with visible embossed markings on the shaft.
description_view_1: A side profile of the wrench, highlighting its thin, flat body and the thickness of both the open and box ends.
description_view_2: The back view mirrors the front, displaying the open jaw and box end, with less visible detail on the shaft markings.
description_view_3: Another side profile, similar to view 1, showing the flatness and uniform thickness of the wrench.
attribute_brand_logo: Embossed markings are visible on the shaft, likely indicating the brand and size, but the specific logo or name is not clearly readable.
